heading: General responsibilities
label: 60302 General responsibilities
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)60302.42 U.S.C. 16672, , .Pub. L. 109–155, title III, § 312119 Stat. 2920Dec. 30, 2005
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)60302.42 U.S.C. 16672, , .Pub. L. 109–155, title III, § 312119 Stat. 2920Dec. 30, 2005

children.text: develop a sustained relationship with the United States commercial remote sensing industry and, consistent with applicable policies and law, to the maximum practicable, rely on their services; and

in conjunction with United States industry and universities, research, develop, and demonstrate prototype Earth science applications to enhance Federal, State, local, and tribal governments’ use of government and commercial remote sensing data, technologies, and other sources of geospatial information for improved decision support to address their needs.
